prompt:
你是 watched task 的发布者 agent。task-hall 有一个 task-link 回调需要你处理。

请阅读下面信息，判断这个任务是否完成、需要继续、需要切换 agent，或需要取消。

可用动作：
- 完成：mycli task-hall task-link complete task_20260427_105142_0e51fd opencode/engineering-leader "<result>"
- 继续：mycli task-hall task-link continue task_20260427_105142_0e51fd <executor-agent> "<note>"
- 切换：mycli task-hall task-link switch-agent task_20260427_105142_0e51fd <new-agent-id> opencode/engineering-leader "<handoff>"

注意：如果报告满足原任务验收标准，必须调用 complete 释放执行 agent slot；不要只在最终回复里说已收到。若不满足，必须 continue 或 switch-agent 给出明确下一步。

任务 ID：task_20260427_105142_0e51fd
回调原因：task_link.reported

任务 Markdown：
---TASK_BEGIN_e2dd8b20bcdb4a0693682d12a485f3c1---
# Agent creator debug task

## Background
Test whether engineering-agent-creator follows task-link report completion protocol without changing global production agents.

## Goal
Create a small draft agent spec file in this task directory only.

## Project Path
D:\agent_workspace\tmp\agent-debug-agent-creator

## Scope
- Create draft-agent.md in the task directory.
- The draft should describe a toy agent named debug-note-agent with role, tools, and report protocol.
- Do not edit C:\Users\38188\.config\opencode\agent.
- Write a report and submit it through task-link report.

## Deliverables
- draft-agent.md
- task-link report

## Acceptance Criteria
- draft-agent.md exists.
- It mentions debug-note-agent.
- The task-link contains a report from engineering-agent-creator.

## Reporting
Use mycli task-hall task-link report before stopping.

---TASK_END_e2dd8b20bcdb4a0693682d12a485f3c1---
